steps.title: Summarize both smell methods
steps.content: The study's finding is that certain fibers let the brain toggle between two ways of processing smell: capturing olfactory information at one moment and tracking changes in that information over time.

steps.title: Reject partial summaries
steps.content: Choice A foregrounds the study method. Choice B mentions only one processing method. Choice C states the research goal rather than the finding. The best summary includes the toggle and both forms of olfactory processing. The answer is D.
